blocks.text: Bodo/Glimt's Night of Destiny — Norway's Champions League Dream on the Line

Tuesday delivers a historic Champions League evening for Norwegian football. Bodo/Glimt travel to Lisbon perfectly level on aggregate — while Haaland's City, Arsenal, Chelsea, and PSG also fight for quarter-final survival.
⚽ Bodo/Glimt at Sporting CP — winner-takes-all, aggregate tied — Norwegian history beckons at 18:45
🎾 Miami Open — ATP/WTA Masters action continues on the Florida hardcourts from 05:00

Bodo/Glimt's trip to Lisbon is the headline — but Erling Haaland faces Real Madrid in a crucial CL decider at the Etihad. Guardiola is reportedly concerned about Haaland's form. Tonight is a chance to silence the doubters.
